proposedWorkspaceStructure.name: Aurous Product HQ
proposedWorkspaceStructure.purpose: Existing approved workspace parent and shared system root.

proposedWorkspaceStructure.name: CEO Home
proposedWorkspaceStructure.purpose: Single operational home base for current priorities, blockers, upcoming commitments, and follow-ups.

proposedWorkspaceStructure.name: Work & Leadership
proposedWorkspaceStructure.purpose: Landing page for strategy, company execution, relationships, meetings, and decisions.

proposedWorkspaceStructure.name: MBA at Wharton
proposedWorkspaceStructure.purpose: Landing page for courses, academic work, networking, and deadlines.

proposedWorkspaceStructure.name: Wedding
proposedWorkspaceStructure.purpose: Landing page for wedding planning, budget, guests, vendors, and responsibilities.

proposedWorkspaceStructure.name: Personal Life
proposedWorkspaceStructure.purpose: Landing page for pickleball, health, travel, reading, notes, and personal goals.

proposedWorkspaceStructure.name: Weekly Review
proposedWorkspaceStructure.purpose: Repeatable review workflow consolidating open work, blocked items, upcoming dates, and follow-ups.

proposedWorkspaceStructure.name: Goals & Outcomes
proposedWorkspaceStructure.purpose: Annual, quarterly, company, MBA, wedding, and personal goals connected to execution.

proposedWorkspaceStructure.name: Projects & Initiatives
proposedWorkspaceStructure.purpose: Company priorities, product initiatives, engineering projects, GTM experiments, and other outcome-oriented work.

proposedWorkspaceStructure.name: Action Hub
proposedWorkspaceStructure.purpose: One unified action database for work, school, wedding, and personal next actions.

proposedWorkspaceStructure.name: People & Relationships
proposedWorkspaceStructure.purpose: Key work, academic, wedding, and personal relationships with follow-up tracking.

proposedWorkspaceStructure.name: Meetings & Decisions
proposedWorkspaceStructure.purpose: Important meetings and leadership decisions with accountable follow-up actions.

proposedWorkspaceStructure.name: MBA Academic Hub
proposedWorkspaceStructure.purpose: Courses, assignments, exams, group projects, readings, events, and academic deadlines.

proposedWorkspaceStructure.name: Wedding Planner
proposedWorkspaceStructure.purpose: Vendors, guests, invitations, events, payments, decisions, questions, deadlines, and shared responsibilities.

proposedWorkspaceStructure.name: Personal Activities & Notes
proposedWorkspaceStructure.purpose: Pickleball, health routines, travel ideas, books, notes, and personal improvement goals.

plannedActions.description: Create the central dashboard page for immediate focus and cross-domain visibility.
Create the work landing page for company strategy and execution.
Create the MBA landing page for academic planning and relationship follow-up.
Create the wedding planning landing page.

properties.value: ["Next actions","Budget and payments","Vendors","Guests and invitations","Open questions"]

plannedActions.description: Create the personal-life landing page.
Create the weekly review page with a lightweight repeatable checklist.

properties.value: ["Review completed work","Choose next actions","Resolve blocked items","Plan next 14 days","Schedule follow-ups"]

plannedActions.description: Create the shared goals database.
Create the work-projects database.
Create the single cross-domain action database.
Create the shared people and relationship database.
Create the database for important meetings and decisions.
Create the unified academic database.
Create the unified wedding planning database.
Create the unified personal planning and notes database.
Configure goal properties, statuses, goal-to-project/action relations, and goal views.

properties.value: [{"name":"Goal","type":"title"},{"name":"Status","type":"status","options":["Not started","On track","At risk","Off track","Achieved","Dropped"]},{"name":"Domain","type":"select","options":["Work","MBA","Wedding","Personal"]},{"name":"Horizon","type":"select","options":["Annual","Quarterly","Monthly"]},{"name":"Target date","type":"date"},{"name":"Progress","type":"number","format":"percent"},{"name":"Projects","type":"relation","targetDatabaseActionId":"action-008","inverseName":"Goals"},{"name":"Actions","type":"relation","targetDatabaseActionId":"action-009","inverseName":"Goals"},{"name":"Outcome / success measure","type":"text"},{"name":"Review notes","type":"text"}]

[{"name":"Current quarter","type":"table","filter":"Horizon is Quarterly and Status is not Achieved and Status is not Dropped"},{"name":"At risk","type":"table","filter":"Status is At risk or Status is Off track"},{"name":"By domain","type":"board","groupBy":"Domain"}

plannedActions.description: Configure work-project properties, statuses, relations, and execution views.

properties.value: [{"name":"Active priorities","type":"board","groupBy":"Status","filter":"Status is Active or Status is At risk"},{"name":"By workstream","type":"board","groupBy":"Workstream","filter":"Status is not Completed and Status is not Canceled"},{"name":"Timeline","type":"timeline","dateProperty":"Target date"}

plannedActions.description: Configure the unified action schema, statuses, relations, and focused task views.

properties.value: [{"name":"Now","type":"table","filter":"Status is Next or Status is In progress","sort":"Priority ascending, Due date ascending"},{"name":"Blocked and waiting","type":"table","filter":"Status is Blocked or Status is Waiting"},{"name":"Upcoming","type":"calendar","dateProperty":"Due date","filter":"Status is not Done and Status is not Canceled"},{"name":"Follow-ups","type":"table","filter":"Follow-up date is on or before today and Status is not Done and Status is not Canceled"},{"name":"By domain","type":"board","groupBy":"Domain","filter":"Status is not Done and Status is not Canceled"}

plannedActions.description: Configure relationship tracking and context-specific follow-up views.

properties.value: [{"name":"Follow up now","type":"table","filter":"Relationship status is Needs follow-up or Follow-up date is on or before today"},{"name":"Work relationships","type":"table","filter":"Context contains Work"},{"name":"MBA network","type":"table","filter":"Context contains MBA"}

plannedActions.description: Configure meeting and decision records with linked people, projects, and actions.

properties.value: [{"name":"Upcoming meetings","type":"calendar","dateProperty":"Date","filter":"Status is Planned"},{"name":"Decisions pending","type":"table","filter":"Status is Decision pending"},{"name":"Recent decisions","type":"table","filter":"Type is Decision","sort":"Date descending"}

plannedActions.description: Configure academic records, deadlines, people links, actions, and course-oriented views.

properties.value: [{"name":"Academic deadlines","type":"calendar","dateProperty":"Due date","filter":"Status is not Submitted and Status is not Completed"},{"name":"Courses","type":"table","filter":"Type is Course"},{"name":"Coursework","type":"board","groupBy":"Course","filter":"Type is Assignment or Type is Exam or Type is Group project"},{"name":"Networking","type":"table","filter":"Type is Networking follow-up"}

assumptions: No existing databases or records are available for reuse beyond the approved Aurous Product HQ page.
The system should begin as a clean framework without seeded personal, company, academic, wedding, or contact records.
A unified Action Hub is preferred over separate task databases so weekly review and home-base views remain low-maintenance.
The approved parent page is intended to host this life-and-work system despite the discovery note that it is an Aurous product workspace.
The exact verified destination is Aurous Product HQ; its internal ID is embedded in every action.
Planning mode: natural-language intent; no preset was inferred.
warnings: The supplied context does not include names for courses, people, wedding participants, vendors, or active projects, so no records or relationship links are proposed.
Some linked page views apply additional filters to a configured database view; these are display filters only and do not create duplicate records.
Aurous Product HQ exactly matches an existing Aurous workspace; use it only if extending the product workspace is intended.

Inspected database schemas contain relations among Milestone Tracker, Task Database, Bug Tracker, Technical Decisions Log, and Launch Checklist. The official MCP exposed related data-source IDs but did not expose exact owning property IDs for all relation properties, so no relation-property objects were emitted rather than inventing IDs.
expectedResult: A Notion-native life-and-work operating system under Aurous Product HQ: six landing pages, eight connected databases, focused domain views, one cross-domain action hub, and a weekly-review workflow. No changes are made during this planning phase.
